_comment: Email-notification recipient list for routine run logs. Read by routines/send_notification.py at the end of every routine fire (STEP 10 in SKILL.md). Edit and commit this file to add or remove subscribers — the next routine run picks up the new list (no redeploy needed). Addresses must be syntactically valid; the sender script skips obvious garbage with a logged warning rather than aborting.

_documentation.primary: Always-include recipients. Receives every routine run notification.
_documentation.additional: Opt-in subscribers. Same behavior as primary; the split is purely organisational so it's clear who the owner is vs who has subscribed.
